message:
Combine CLIP and LanceQL into single WASM module

- Add CLIP text encoder functions to wasm.zig:
  - clip_init, clip_get_text_buffer, clip_get_output_buffer
  - clip_alloc_model_buffer, clip_load_model, clip_encode_text
  - GELU, softmax, layer norm, matmul helpers
  - Basic tokenizer (simplified BPE)
- Update index.html to use combined lanceql.wasm for CLIP
- Remove need for separate clip.wasm file
- Single 14.5KB WASM now handles both Lance parsing and CLIP encoding
